narration_text: Now we'll take a closer look at the structure of the internet, and I want you to focus on the different types of networks that make it up. Notice that we have mobile networks, home networks, enterprise networks, and datacenter networks, each with its own unique characteristics. Look at the diagram on your slide — notice how the nodes at each level are connected, and think about how data flows through these networks. As you observe the image, consider how these different networks interact with each other to provide the services we use every day. Let's think about this together, and then we'll explore how these networks are connected to the network edge.
